blockingIssues.description: publishProfileBackup returns publish results but does not persist/display a 'most recent publish' indicator/timestamp in Settings, leaving VAL-BACKUP-005/VAL-BACKUP-031 unmet.
src/e2e/multi-device/backup-restore.spec.ts uses ws://127.0.0.1:8194 while restore validation accepts only wss:// URLs, so claimed restore coverage is not executable as written.
restoreProfileFromRelay queries relays sequentially under a shared timeout window; a slow/hung earlier relay can prevent querying later relays and cause false 'No backup found' outcomes.
CreateKeysetScreen only validates nsec input with startsWith('nsec1'), so structurally malformed nsec1 values bypass inline validation and fail later as top-level errors (VAL-BACKUP-021 gap).

appliedUpdates.description: Added a restore-flow caveat to .factory/library/user-testing.md documenting that restore relay validation is wss-only and local_relay (ws://127.0.0.1:8194) cannot be used directly for restore assertions.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten ui-screen-worker procedure compliance checks so `followedProcedure: true` cannot be reported when required evidence (RED-first artifact, required agent-browser/playwright checks) is missing from the handoff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m6-backup-publish, m6-backup-restore, and m6-camera-qr-scan reviews each reported procedure-required checks absent while handoffs still marked followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that local_relay ws:// endpoint is for transport-focused local multi-device tests and does not satisfy restore-flow assertions that require wss:// relay inputs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m6-backup-restore review found a ws:// local relay used in restore e2e while restore input validation enforces wss://, causing non-executable claimed coverage.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated ui-screen-worker procedure-compliance notes across multiple review reports.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate: consolidated into a single systemic skills guidance recommendation.
